(0,_lib_supabase_client__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_3__.createClient)();\n    // Data states\n    const [dashboardData, setDashboardData] = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useState)({\n        users: [],\n        totalUsers: 0,\n        totalTrades: 0,\n        totalDeposits: 0,\n        withdrawals: []\n    });\n    const [selectedUserDetail, setSelectedUserDetail] = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useState)(null);\n    const [userDetailData, setUserDetailData] = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useState)(null);\n    const [isUserDetailLoading, setIsUserDetailLoading] = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useState)(false);\n    const [wallets, setWallets] = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useState)([]);\n    const [deposits, setDeposits] = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useState)([]);\n    const [activeTrades, setActiveTrades] = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useState)([]);\n    const [chatUsers, setChatUsers] = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useState)([]);\n    const [selectedChatUser, setSelectedChatUser] = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useState)(null);\n    const [chatMessages, setChatMessages] = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useState)([]);\n    const [chatInput, setChatInput] = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useState)('');\n    const chatEndRef = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useRef)(null);\n    (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useEffect)({\n        \"AdminDashboard.useEffect\": ()=>{\n            checkAdmin();\n        }\n    }[\"AdminDashboard.useEffect\"], []);\n    const checkAdmin = async ()=>{\n        const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();\n        if (!user) {\n            router.push('/');\n            return;\n        }\n        const { data: userData } = await supabase.from('users').select('role').eq('id', user.id).single();\n        if (userData?.role === 'superadmin') {\n            setIsAdmin(true);\n            fetchAllData();\n        } else {\n            router.push('/dashboard');\n        }\n        setIsLoading(false);\n    };\n    const fetchAllData = async ()=>{\n        const res = await (0,_actions__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_4__.getAdminDashboardData)();\n        if (res.success) setDashboardData(res.data);\n        const wRes = await (0,_actions__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_4__.getAdminWallets)();\n        if (wRes.success) setWallets(wRes.data);\n        const dRes = await (0,_actions__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_4__.getDepositsAdmin)();\n        if (dRes.success) setDeposits(dRes.data);\n        const tRes = await (0,_actions__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_4__.getActiveOptionTradesAdmin)();\n        if (tRes.success) setActiveTrades(tRes.data);\n        const cRes = await (0,_actions__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_4__.getChatUsers)();\n        if (cRes.success) setChatUsers(cRes.data);\n    };\n    const handleLogout = async ()=>{\n        await supabase.auth.signOut();\n        router.push('/');\n    };\n    // --- Users Actions ---\n    const handleViewUser = async (userId)=>{\n        setSelectedUserDetail(userId);\n        setIsUserDetailLoading(true);\n        const res = await (0,_actions__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_4__.getUserDetailsAdmin)(userId);\n        if (res.success) setUserDetailData(res.data);\n        setIsUserDetailLoading(false);\n    };\n    // --- Wallet Actions ---\n    const handleAddWallet = async (e)=>{\n        e.preventDefault();\n        const formData = new FormData(e.currentTarget);\n        await (0,_actions__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_4__.addAdminWallet)(formData);\n        e.currentTarget.reset();\n        const wRes = await (0,_actions__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_4__.getAdminWallets)();\n        if (wRes.success) setWallets(wRes.data);\n    };\n    const handleDeleteWallet = async (id)=>{\n        await (0,_actions__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_4__.deleteAdminWallet)(id);\n        const wRes = await (0,_actions__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_4__.getAdminWallets)();\n        if (wRes.success) setWallets(wRes.data);\n    };\n    // --- Funds Actions ---\n    const handleApproveDeposit = async (id)=>{\n        await (0,_actions__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_4__.approveDeposit)(id);\n        const dRes = await (0,_actions__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_4__.getDepositsAdmin)();\n        if (dRes.success) setDeposits(dRes.data);\n    };\n    const handleRejectDeposit = async (id)=>{\n        await (0,_actions__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_4__.rejectDeposit)(id);\n        const dRes = await (0,_actions__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_4__.getDepositsAdmin)();\n        if (dRes.success) setDeposits(dRes.data);\n    };\n    const handleReverseDeposit = async (id)=>{\n        await (0,_actions__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_4__.reverseDeposit)(id);\n        const dRes = await (0,_actions__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_4__.getDepositsAdmin)();\n        if (dRes.success) setDeposits(dRes.data);\n    };\n    // --- Trades Actions ---\n    const handleResolveTrade = async (id, result)=>{\n        await (0,_actions__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_4__.resolveOptionTradeByAdmin)(id, result);\n        const tRes = await (0,_actions__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_4__.getActiveOptionTradesAdmin)();\n        if (tRes.success) setActiveTrades(tRes.data);\n    };\n    // --- Chat Actions ---\n    const handleSelectChatUser = async (u)=>{\n        setSelectedChatUser(u);\n        await (0,_actions__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_4__.markMessagesAsReadByAdmin)(u.id);\n        fetchMessages(u.id);\n    };\n    const fetchMessages = async (userId)=>{\n        const res = await (0,_actions__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_4__.getAdminMessages)(userId);\n        if (res.success) {\n            setChatMessages(res.data);\n            setTimeout(()=>chatEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({\n                    behavior: 'smooth'\n                }), 100);\n        }\n    };\n    const handleSendMessage = async (e)=>{\n        e.preventDefault();\n        if (!chatInput.trim() || !selectedChatUser) return;\n        const msg = chatInput;\n        setChatInput('');\n        await (0,_actions__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_4__.sendAdminMessage)(selectedChatUser.id, msg);\n        fetchMessages(selectedChatUser.id);\n    };\n    if (isLoading) return /*#__PURE__*/ next_navigation__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_2__.useRouter\n    ];\n});\n_c = AdminDashboard;\nvar _c;\n$RefreshReg$(_c, \"AdminDashboard\");\n\n\n;\n    // Wrapped in an IIFE to avoid polluting the global scope\n    ;\n    (function () {\n        var _a, _b;\n        // Legacy CSS implementations will `eval` browser code in a Node.js context\n        // to extract CSS. For backwards compatibility, we need to check we're in a\n        // browser context before continuing.\n        if (typeof self !== 'undefined' &&\n            // No-JS mode does not inject these helpers:\n            '$RefreshHelpers$' in self) {\n            // @ts-ignore __webpack_module__ is global\n            var currentExports = module.exports;\n            // @ts-ignore __webpack_module__ is global\n            var prevSignature = (_b = (_a = module.hot.data) === null || _a === void 0 ? void 0 : _a.prevSignature) !== null && _b !== void 0 ? _b : null;\n            // This cannot happen in MainTemplate because the exports mismatch between\n            // templating and execution.\n            self.$RefreshHelpers$.registerExportsForReactRefresh(currentExports, module.id);\n            // A module can be accepted automatically based on its exports, e.g. when\n            // it is a Refresh Boundary.\n            if (self.$RefreshHelpers$.isReactRefreshBoundary(currentExports)) {\n                // Save the previous exports signature on update so we can compare the boundary\n                // signatures. We avoid saving exports themselves since it causes memory leaks (https://github.com/vercel/next.js/pull/53797)\n                module.hot.dispose(function (data) {\n                    data.prevSignature =\n                        self.$RefreshHelpers$.getRefreshBoundarySignature(currentExports);\n                });\n                // Unconditionally accept an update to this module, we'll check if it's\n                // still a Refresh Boundary later.\n                // @ts-ignore importMeta is replaced in the loader\n                module.hot.accept();\n                // This field is set when the previous version of this module was a\n                // Refresh Boundary, letting us know we need to check for invalidation or\n                // enqueue an update.\n                if (prevSignature !== null) {\n                    // A boundary can become ineligible if its exports are incompatible\n                    // with the previous exports.\n                    //\n                    // For example, if you add/remove/change exports, we'll want to\n                    // re-execute the importing modules, and force those components to\n                    // re-render. Similarly, if you convert a class component to a\n                    // function, we want to invalidate the boundary.\n                    if (self.$RefreshHelpers$.shouldInvalidateReactRefreshBoundary(prevSignature, self.$RefreshHelpers$.getRefreshBoundarySignature(currentExports))) {\n                        module.hot.invalidate();\n                    }\n                    else {\n                        self.$RefreshHelpers$.scheduleUpdate();\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n            else {\n                // Since we just executed the code for the module, it's possible that the\n                // new exports made it ineligible for being a boundary.\n                // We only care about the case when we were _previously_ a boundary,\n                // because we already accepted this update (accidental side effect).\n                var isNoLongerABoundary = prevSignature !== null;\n                if (isNoLongerABoundary) {\n                    module.hot.invalidate();\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    })();\n//# sourceURL=[module]\n//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;charset=utf-8;base64,\n//# sourceURL=webpack-internal:///(app-pages-browser)/./src/app/admin/page.tsx\n"));

/***/ })

});
